Minocycline, one of the drugs listed among the options, is known to cause flagellate pigmentation of the skin. Therefore, the correct answer is:
\boxed{B} Based on well-documented cases and clinical experience, minocycline is recognized for causing flagellate pigmentation of the skin due to its ability to deposit iron-containing compounds in connective tissue. Thus, the correct option is B: Minocycline.
